sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, class_name VARCHAR(255), class_description XML);
INSERT INTO test_classes (id, class_name, class_description) VALUES (1, 'java.lang.Object', JVM_REF_IMPORT(NULL, 'java.lang.Object'));
INSERT INTO test_classes (id, class_name, class_description) VALUES (2, 'java.lang.System', JVM_REF_IMPORT(NULL, vector('java.lang.Object', 'java.lang.System')));
SELECT * FROM test_classes WHERE class_name <> 'java.lang.String' AND class_description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, class_name FROM test_classes WHERE class_description <> JVM_REF_IMPORT(NULL, 'java.lang.Object') ORDER BY class_name;
SELECT id, class_name FROM test_classes WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_classes WHERE class_name <> 'java.lang.System') HAVING COUNT(class_name) <> 0;
SELECT DISTINCT class_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_classes AS t2 WHERE t2.class_name <> t1.class_name) AS count_diff FROM test_classes AS t1 WHERE class_name IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_test (temp_id INT, temp_value VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO temp_test (temp_id, temp_value) VALUES (1, NULL);
INSERT INTO temp_test (temp_id, temp_value) VALUES (2, 'Boundary Case');
SELECT temp_id, temp_value FROM temp_test WHERE temp_value <> 'Normal Value' OR temp_value IS NULL;
UPDATE test_classes SET class_description = JVM_REF_IMPORT(NULL, 'java.lang.Error') WHERE class_name <> 'java.lang.System';
SELECT class_name, (JVM_REF_IMPORT(NULL, class_name) IS NOT NULL) AS valid_description FROM test_classes WHERE class_description <> NULL;
SELECT temp_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_classes WHERE class_description <> JVM_REF_IMPORT(NULL,'java.lang.Object')) AS class_count FROM temp_test WHERE temp_value <> '' ORDER BY temp_value DESC;
